<div n="to"/>to split, cleave, break, cut or rend asunder, pierce, destroy, <ls>RV.</ls> &c. &c.;
<div n="to"/>to pass through (as a planet or comet), <ls>Hariv.</ls>; <ls>Var.</ls>;

<div n="to"/>to transgress, violate, (a compact or alliance), <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ls>Kāv.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to open, expand, <ls>MaitrUp.</ls>; <ls>Megh.</ls>;

<div n="to"/>to disturb, interrupt, stop, <ls>ib.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to disclose, betray, <ls>Mn.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to disunite, set at variance, <ls>ib.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to distinguish, discriminate, <ls>L.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Pass.</ab> <s>Bidya/te</s> (<lang>ep.</lang> also <s>˚ti</s> <ab>aor.</ab> <s>aBedi</s>, <ls>Br.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.; <ab>pf.</ab> <s>biBide</s>, <ls>Kālid.</ls>),
<div n="to"/>to be split or broken, burst (<ab>intrans.</ab>), <ls>Br.</ls> &c. &c.;
<div n="to"/>to be opened (as a closed hand, eyes &c.), <ls>Kāv.</ls>; <ls>Pur.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to overflow (as water), <ls>R.</ls>; <ls>Hariv.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to be loosened, become loose, <ls>MuṇḍUp.</ls>; <ls>Kāv.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to be stopped or interrupted, <ls>MBh.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to be disclosed or betrayed, <ls>Kāv.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to be changed or altered (in mind), be won over, <ls>Kāv.</ls>; <ls>Pur.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to be disunited, <ls>MBh.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to keep aloof from (<ab>instr.</ab>), <ls>ib.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to be distinguished, differ from (<ab>abl.</ab>), <ls>Sāṃkhyak.</ls>; <ls>Kāv.</ls> &c.:
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>Bedayati</s>, <s>˚te</s> (<ab>aor.</ab> <s>abIBidat</s>; <ab>cf.</ab> also <s>BidApana</s>),
<div n="to"/>to cause to split or break &c.;
<div n="to"/>to split, break, shatter, crush, destroy, <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ls>Hariv.</ls>; <ls>Hit.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to separate, divide (see <s>Bedita</s>);
<div n="to"/>to disunite, set at variance, perplex, unsettle (in opinion), seduce, win over, <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ls>R.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>bi/Bitsati</s>, <s>˚te</s>, to wish to break through or disperse or defeat, <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> (<ab>cf.</ab>, <s>biBitsA</s>) :
